hooks.command: cd /d/prog/heat_map && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (MSG=$(git diff --cached --name-status | awk 'BEGIN{a="";m="";d=""} $1=="A"{a=a" "$2} $1=="M"{m=m" "$2} $1=="D"{d=d" "$2} END{if(a!="")print "add:"a; if(m!="")print "update:"m; if(d!="")print "remove:"d}' | paste -sd "; ") && git commit -m "$MSG" && git push origin master)
